article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his career.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. His production style is characterized by a blend of electronic and dancehall elements.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a blend of electronic and dancehall elements, which has earned him a distinct position within the Latin electronic music scene.
In collaboration with Barnation, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack,' a collection that includes all of his samples, loops, and drums used in various works.
His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
